text: The community came together after the natural disaster, showing remarkable _____ in the face of adversity. Neighbors helped rebuild homes and shared resources freely.
Despite years of _____ between the two nations, the leaders finally agreed to sit down for peace negotiations. Both sides acknowledged that continued conflict served no one.
The scientist's discovery was met with widespread _____ from the academic community, as many researchers doubted the validity of the experimental methodology.
Growing up in a household that valued education above all else instilled a deep sense of _____ in the young woman, driving her to pursue a doctoral degree.
The artist's latest exhibition explored themes of _____ and belonging, featuring portraits of immigrants who had built new lives in foreign countries.
After decades of authoritarian rule, the citizens demanded greater _____ and the right to participate in free and fair elections.
The teacher recognized that each student learns differently and showed great _____ in adapting her methods to accommodate diverse learning styles.
The whistleblower acted out of a sense of moral _____, believing that the public had a right to know about the company's illegal activities.
The sudden loss of their mother filled the family with profound _____, and it took years before they could speak about her without tears.
The new policy was designed to promote _____ among employees by ensuring that everyone received equal pay for equal work regardless of background.
